strict_goal.statement: Turn family-to-specific exact closure into a concrete dense harvesting target manifest, with explicit concept groups, prompt groups, tensor axes, and hard-gap reasoning.
strict_goal.boundary: This block prepares execution. It does not claim dense family-to-specific exact closure has already been achieved.

target_groups.name: fruit_family_specific_core
target_groups.why: 先在同一家族里把 family patch 和 concept offset 的主轴打穿，这是 family-to-specific exact closure 的最短路径。
target_groups.expected_gain: 直接提高 family -> specific 的可恢复性。

target_groups.name: cross_family_shape_controls
target_groups.why: 用跨家族但带相似属性的概念做对照，区分“共享属性方向”与“对象身份底板”。
target_groups.expected_gain: 帮助分离 attribute fiber 和 family patch，避免把相似属性误判成相同对象编码。

target_groups.name: family_neighbor_recovery
target_groups.why: 直接检查苹果是否能从 fruit 底板恢复到具体邻近对象差异，这是最贴近当前 exact gap 的局部闭环测试。
target_groups.expected_gain: 细化 apple -> pear / banana 的局部恢复边界。

specific_schema.rationale: specific 线要能回到 family -> specific 的 exact neuron signatures。

strict_conclusion.core_answer: The next concrete step for family-to-specific exact closure is no longer abstract: first harvest dense tensors on fruit-family specific targets, then add cross-family shape controls, and only then judge whether shared attributes and object-specific offsets can be cleanly separated.
main_hard_gaps: family-to-specific exact closure is still far below parameteric restoration
cross-family attribute controls are still missing direct dense tensors
current evidence is still stronger at row/signature level than dense neuron level
